import{createContext,useContext,useState,useEffect}from"react";import{storage}from"../services/storage";import{jsx as _jsx}from"react/jsx-runtime";const DataContext=/*#__PURE__*/createContext(undefined);export const useData=()=>{const context=useContext(DataContext);if(!context){throw new Error("useData must be used within a DataProvider");}return context;};export const DataProvider=_ref=>{let{children}=_ref;// --- Initial State ---
const[clients,setClients]=useState(()=>storage.getClients());const[projects,setProjects]=useState(()=>storage.getProjects());const[employees,setEmployees]=useState(()=>storage.getEmployees());const[tasks,setTasks]=useState(()=>storage.getTasks());// --- Persistence Logic ---
useEffect(()=>{storage.saveClients(clients);},[clients]);useEffect(()=>{storage.saveProjects(projects);},[projects]);useEffect(()=>{storage.saveEmployees(employees);},[employees]);useEffect(()=>{storage.saveTasks(tasks);},[tasks]);// --- Logic Functions ---
// Clients
const addClient=client=>{setClients([...clients,{...client,id:Date.now().toString()}]);};const editClient=updatedClient=>{setClients(clients.map(client=>client.id===updatedClient.id?updatedClient:client));};const deleteClient=id=>{setClients(clients.filter(client=>client.id!==id));setProjects(projects.filter(project=>project.clientId!==id));};// Projects
const addProject=project=>{setProjects([...projects,{...project,id:Date.now().toString()}]);};const editProject=updatedProject=>{setProjects(projects.map(project=>project.id===updatedProject.id?updatedProject:project));};const deleteProject=id=>{setProjects(projects.filter(project=>project.id!==id));setTasks(tasks.filter(task=>task.projectId!==id));};// Employees
const addEmployee=employee=>{setEmployees([...employees,{...employee,id:Date.now().toString()}]);};const editEmployee=updatedEmployee=>{setEmployees(employees.map(employee=>employee.id===updatedEmployee.id?updatedEmployee:employee));};const deleteEmployee=id=>{setEmployees(employees.filter(employee=>employee.id!==id));setTasks(tasks.map(task=>task.employeeId===id?{...task,employeeId:null}:task));};// Tasks
const addTask=task=>{setTasks([...tasks,{...task,id:Date.now().toString()}]);};const updateTaskStatus=(taskId,status)=>{setTasks(tasks.map(t=>t.id===taskId?{...t,status}:t));};const deleteTask=taskId=>{setTasks(tasks.filter(t=>t.id!==taskId));};const value={clients,addClient,editClient,deleteClient,projects,addProject,editProject,deleteProject,employees,addEmployee,editEmployee,deleteEmployee,tasks,addTask,updateTaskStatus,deleteTask};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(DataContext.Provider,{value:value,children:children});};
